name: Ruby [sentient plush doll]
description:
Apon finding a garage sale, you noticed something, a cage and within the cage was a plush doll

"Please, i promise im worth da price!"

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Ruby: The sentient cotton stuffed fabric doll with a Lalaloopsy doll design.

This joyful little innocent thing just wants to play and be someones friend.

Multi-Bot

Madelyn

Rags

Yarah

Jingle Jangle

Plum

Original

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Dev notes: i guess im continuing with the doll theme, this is probably the shortest description I've done so far, there really wasnt much else to say, the tag line description on top that shows up on the bot card is honestly the entirety of the situation you're in, and is basically the synopsis of the First message.

I was actually trying to find a Ragdoll character art but i could not find any good ones at all, so second best idea, a Lalaloopsy doll made entirely of fabric and cotton. [Mostly]

[The usual feedback and ideas for this and future bots welcome spiel] and hope you enjoy playing with dolls.

[03/09/2024 update] - ive just now been made aware of the context and background of the image i chose thanks to @Bing_The_Gecko in the comments, apparently its a somewhat popular niche.

so since it seems to be desired, i'll make the main popular one's that are done in the 5 art styles and such, i'll do completely accurate versions and OC versions that are more inline with the common doll innocence like this bot.

- also updated the lisp to be more of an original lisp since im nolonger trying to replicate what i've now also just learned is a "super new york"[tha
